windows.old_description: Rows of white candle jars setting.
windows.embed_text_v2: Vlog b-roll unboxing pink Swell water bottle in plastic wrap inside car, Uline shipping package, rural farm pasture wooden fence No Trespassing sign, then box of empty clear glass candle jars and round white labels
windows.summary_v2: Vlog B-roll: a free pink Swell water bottle is shown in the car, then a rural farm field with a No Trespassing sign, then an overhead of empty glass candle jars and labels in a box.

tags_v2.action: showing free bottle and farm scenery, then empty jars
tags_v2.setting: car interior, rural farm field, then tabletop
tags_v2.on_screen_text: At checkout, Uline gave me the option to choose a free product, and I picked this pink Swell bottle!

seconds_v2.desc: Inside a car, a hand holds a pink stainless Swell-style water bottle still sealed in clear plastic wrap, resting on a white Uline shipping mailer; burned-in yellow caption reads 'At checkout, Uline gave me the option to choose a free product, and I picked this pink Swell bottle!'
Closer angle on the same plastic-wrapped pink bottle held over the red-and-white Uline package on the car seat; the maker is showing off the free promo bottle, not making candles.
Hard cut to outdoor B-roll: a sunny rural pasture behind a weathered wooden post-and-rail fence, autumn trees and a 'NO TRESPASSING' sign, blue sky with scattered clouds.
Panning continues across the same farm field; the wooden fence line, a utility pole, distant barn and orange-brown treeline fill the frame under a bright sky.
Pasture view keeps panning, showing dark grazing cattle in the distance beyond the rail fence, dry brush in the foreground and a wooded ridge behind.
Wider sweep of the countryside: rolling field, post-and-rail fencing, a small white barn and a bare sapling, autumn forest along the horizon.
Final field shot centring on the 'NO TRESPASSING' sign on the wooden gate, fallen leaves in the foreground grass, cattle and treeline beyond.
Full black transition frame between scenes; nothing visible.
Overhead vignette shot into an open cardboard box of empty clear glass candle jars with a roll of round white labels at the upper left, more empty jars laid out beside the box on a table.

windows.embed_text: a bunch of beer cans with a bunch of beer cans in the background | a bunch of cans with some yellow lids
windows.embed_text_v2: Pouring molten yellow scented wax from stainless steel pitcher into rows of empty silver paint-can tin candles with black plastic collars and pre-set white wicks, batch filling overhead view
windows.summary_v2: A steel pitcher pours molten yellow wax one by one into rows of empty silver paint-can tins fitted with black collars and pre-set wicks.

tags_v2.action: pouring molten wax into paint-can tins

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead close-up: a stainless-steel pouring pitcher tips molten yellow-tinted wax into the first of many empty silver paint-can-style candle tins, each fitted with a black plastic collar and a pale pre-set wick standing up; rows of waiting tins fill the frame.
The pitcher continues dispensing wax into a tin at the front-left of the grid; surrounding tins remain empty with their black collars and upright wicks, a few already showing a pool of yellow wax.
Pour moves to the next tin; molten wax glints in the spout as the maker fills cans one by one across the tightly packed array of wicked paint-can tins.
Wax streams into another front-row tin, several nearby cans now holding shallow yellow wax pools; wicks lean and curl above the black collar rings.
Pitcher fills a further tin; the camera looks down the rows of silver cans, front ones filled with yellow wax, back ones still empty, all with white wicks.
Pitcher has lifted away; wider top-down view of dozens of paint-can tins with black collars, many front rows now poured with yellow wax and wicks splayed across them.
Static overhead of the filled grid: rows of silver tins with black plastic rims, glossy yellow wax pooled inside the front cans, pale wicks draped over the collar edges.
Same array of wax-filled paint-can tins; the molten yellow wax surfaces are still liquid and reflective, wicks lying across the black collars awaiting centring.
Final overhead frame: the pouring pitcher edges back in at top-left over the field of freshly poured yellow-wax tins with black collars and scattered white wicks.

windows.old_description: Overhead rows of candle tins setting (large batch).
windows.embed_text_v2: Finished sealed silver paint-can tin candles with round lid labels arranged in rows beside labelled amber jar candles, hand placing label, Christmas tree and fairy lights, product display b-roll
windows.summary_v2: Styled B-roll of finished, sealed paint-can candles and labelled jar candles arranged with holiday decor while a hand adjusts a label.

tags_v2.action: displaying finished labelled candles and adjusting a label

seconds_v2.desc: Low-angle close-up of finished, sealed silver paint-can candles standing in rows on a white surface, round white labels on their lids; labelled amber/clear jar candles sit behind, with a wooden Christmas tree, red ribbon and warm fairy lights as festive decor.
Same arranged display of capped paint-can candles and labelled jars; the holiday lights glow softly at right beside the wooden tree, finished products styled for presentation.
Static shot of the sealed tin candles with printed top labels, rows receding toward the labelled jar candles and Christmas decor in the warm-lit background.
Identical styled scene of finished paint-can and jar candles; focus rests on the front tins' lid labels, decor lights bokeh behind.
A hand reaches in from behind to set or adjust a small white label on a jar candle among the finished products; capped tin candles remain in the foreground.
The hand continues placing/straightening a label on the jar candles at the back; foreground sealed paint-can candles with top labels stay in focus amid the holiday styling.
Hand withdraws upward; the arranged display of lidded tin candles and labelled jars sits with the wooden Christmas tree and fairy lights softly glowing.
Static finished-product shot again: rows of sealed silver paint-can candles with round lid labels, jar candles and festive decor behind.
Final frame of the styled candle inventory: capped tin candles foreground, labelled jars and warm Christmas lights behind, presentation B-roll.
